basic_details.job_title: SBI Clerk Mains Score Card 2026 OUT (Direct Link) - Download Scorecard
basic_details.short_information: Quick Summary: State Bank of India (SBI) has released SBI Clerk Mains Score Card 2026 on 10th March 2026 at official portal sbi.co.in. Candidates can download their scorecard using Registration Number & Password/DOB. Check section-wise marks, total score, cutoffs, and next steps below.

important_instructions: ✓ Download and save your scorecard immediately ✓ Take 3-4 printouts for future reference ✓ Prepare for Language Proficiency Test (LPT) if qualified ✓ Keep original documents ready for verification ✓ Verify all details on scorecard - report discrepancies promptly ✓ Check official website regularly for further updates ✓ Compare your marks with state/category cutoff
